diagrams.title: Turing Machine Architecture
diagrams.description: Standard 7-tuple model of Turing Machine showing all components and data flow
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the basic structure of Turing Machine and how components interact during computation

diagrams.title: Configuration State Representation
diagrams.description: Shows how to represent a snapshot of TM computation with state, tape content, and head position
diagrams.purpose: Learning to read and write TM configurations during step-by-step computation trace

diagrams.title: Chomsky Hierarchy with Machine Power
diagrams.description: Four-level hierarchy showing language classes from most restricted to most powerful with corresponding machine models
elements: Arrows showing strict inclusion - each level is subset of level below
diagrams.purpose: Understanding relationship between language classes and computational power of machines
